name: Ardelyx Inc. Registered Shares
summary: Ardelyx Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing innovative therapies to improve the lives of patients with kidney and cardiovascular diseases. The company's lead product, IBSRELA (tenapanor), is approved for the treatment of irritable bowel syndrome with constipation (IBS-C). Its headquarters are located in Fremont, California.
